channel.title: AI/ML QA Sprint Services | aiml.qa on aiml.qa | AI/ML QA Services - Test, Validate & Red-Team Your AI
channel.description: Recent content in AI/ML QA Sprint Services | aiml.qa on aiml.qa | AI/ML QA Services - Test, Validate & Red-Team Your AI

item.title: AI QA Readiness Assessment | aiml.qa - 3-Day AI Audit
item.description:
The AI QA Readiness Assessment is the fastest way to understand your AI quality risk - and the entry point for every aiml.qa engagement.

What the Assessment Covers

Most AI teams have some form of evaluation. Few have a systematic view of their QA coverage across all three layers where AI systems fail:

Model layer - Is your model evaluated beyond accuracy? Bias testing, fairness across demographic subgroups, robustness to adversarial inputs, and edge-case coverage are routinely absent from internal evaluations.

item.title: LLM Evaluation & Red-Teaming | aiml.qa - Hallucination & Safety Testing
item.description:
LLM red-teaming is the practice of systematically finding ways your language model can be made to behave badly - before your users, customers, or adversaries find them for you.

Why Standard Testing Misses LLM Vulnerabilities

Traditional software testing is deterministic: given input A, output B. LLMs are probabilistic: a prompt that fails today may succeed tomorrow with minor rephrasing. Standard QA teams test for bugs in code; they are not equipped to test for hallucination, prompt injection, jailbreak paths, or emergent safety failures in language models.

item.title: ML Model Validation Service | aiml.qa - Bias, Accuracy & Robustness Testing
item.description: ML model validation is the systematic, independent evaluation of a machine learning model’s performance - accuracy, bias, robustness, and edge-case behaviour - against defined requirements before and during production deployment.

item.title: Training Data Quality Audit | aiml.qa - Dataset Validation Service
item.description: Training data quality is the most consistently underinvested area of ML development - and the root cause of most silent production model failures.

item.title: AI Product QA Service | aiml.qa - LLM App & Agent Testing
item.description: AI product QA is the systematic testing of products built on AI/ML components - LLM apps, copilots, recommendation systems, AI agents - for functional correctness, regression stability, and adversarial resilience.

item.title: MLOps Pipeline Testing Service | aiml.qa - CI/CD for ML
item.description: MLOps pipeline testing is the practice of systematically verifying that your ML pipeline - from data ingestion to production deployment - behaves correctly under normal conditions and fails safely under fault conditions.
